items.prompt: Across sectors in this chapter, which lifecycle pattern recurs?
choices: Skip quality and train immediately on raw dumps
Define entities, assess quality, explore, then act on findings
Only encrypt files and never analyze them
items.explain: Table 1.10 and the surrounding prose emphasize define, assess, explore, and act across domains.

items.prompt: The customer-churn case study includes exploration and cleaning before modeling.
items.explain: Section 1.5.3 presents explore/clean as steps in the full analytics workflow before scoring and intervention.

items.prompt: Purchase-history datasets in retail are typically used to support:
items.explain: Table 1.10 lists segmentation, demand forecasting, and recommendations for business/retail datasets.

items.prompt: Name one action retention teams take after a churn model scores customers.
items.rubric: Accept offers, support outreach, or similar intervention before cancellation.
items.sample_answer: Intervene with offers or support before the customer cancels.
